## [00:00 - 02:15]

Because after you launch a campaign, the first step to success is to look and see what happened, right? But you've got to know where to pull that data from and you have to know which metrics to look at. The third video is all about optimizing. So the metrics will tell us where we need to optimize. So it's our job as media buyers to understand what those metrics mean and then to take action steps to affect those metrics. That really is the process of optimization. For troubleshooting campaigns, so if stuff still isn't working, what do you do? How do you troubleshoot? This is probably the most important process for media buyers. As I said earlier in the course, only 20% of what I launch actually works. But I end up finding success because I'm willing to troubleshoot. I don't just launch the campaign and say, oh that didn't work, shucks. I launch the campaign, I analyze the data, and I start to optimize and troubleshoot to make it better. Video 5, scaling. This is one of our favorite topics, right? Because to scale, it means that something's working. So after you get something to work, how do you scale?
